channel.title: Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Mapping database views in EF Core without breaking migrations
item.description: Entity Framework Core (EF Core) is working fine in your project. But the moment you use views, the migration gets messy. As a developer, I know any problem in the migration is haunting. You have to update and take care of other migrations so they don't get disturbed. Link to article: https://blog.elmah.io/mapping-database-views-in-ef-core-without-breaking-migrations/
